title: Identify the effects of climate change as a factor in land management
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify the effects of climate change as a factor in land management demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the climate system and climate change as they relate to land management

pcs.text: Identify the components of the climate system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the components of the climate system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the components of the climate system.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the potential impacts of climate change on local natural and agricultural environments.
